description: Allowlisting a scanner finding that is actually a live secret silences the alert while leaving the credential exposed.
body: Failure mode: a pre-commit or CI scan flags a value and it is added to the baseline or ignore list to unblock work, but the value is a real secret. Detection signals: a baselined entry corresponds to a genuine credential; the scan passes despite a live key; the allowlist grows without review. Do not baseline a finding without verifying it is not a secret. Safer fallback: verify each finding safely without echoing it, rotate and remove any real secret, baseline only confirmed non-secrets, and review the allowlist periodically; escalate uncertain cases to a human.
